EmailTemplate.name: CBPF Early Settlement
EmailTemplate.subject: Early Cancellation of Agreement
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
The letter that you have received from Close Brothers is a generic letter which they send to all customers whose agreements have been cancelled early.
We do appreciate that this is a bit confusing but, as per our previous email, please rest assured that there is nothing further owed by yourself in relation to your Kingsbridge policy.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
